raw_title: Newer, Larger, Better? A Critique of the Unreflective LLM Adoption in Communication Research
title_en: Newer, Larger, Better? A Critique of the Unreflective LLM Adoption in Communication Research
title_zh: 更新、更大、更好？对传播研究中不加反思采用大语言模型的批判
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章批判性地审视了传播研究领域不加反思地采用大语言模型（如ChatGPT）的趋势。作者们质疑了那种认为更新、更大的模型就必然更好的假设，指出这种盲目采用可能存在的问题和风险。文章呼吁研究者在使用这些先进技术时要更加审慎和有批判性。
plain_summary_en: This article critically examines the trend of unreflective adoption of large language models (like ChatGPT) in communication research. The authors question the assumption that newer and larger models are necessarily better, pointing out potential problems and risks of this uncritical adoption. The paper calls for more careful and critical use of these advanced technologies by researchers.
research_direction_zh: 传播研究方法论中的技术批判与反思，关注人工智能工具在学术研究中的合理应用与评估。
research_direction_en: Critical reflection on technology in communication research methodology, focusing on appropriate application and evaluation of AI tools in academic research.
